channel.title: JLT Spotlight (Facebook)
channel.description: Weekly Cruise, Hotel & Destination of the Week from JLT Group

item.title: The client for this one is the family who has done Florida twice and is ready for a US Southwest change of pace. рџЊµ
item.description:
The client for this one is the family who has done Florida twice and is ready for a US Southwest change of pace. рџЊµ
Arizona checks more boxes than most agents realise. Tucson's guest ranches give multi-gen families riding, hiking and Saguaro National Park scenery, while Scottsdale handles the luxury end with serious spa and resort credentials. One state, three or four distinct experiences, and a daily BA service into Phoenix.
Visit Arizona has a live agent webinar this Tuesday 7 July at 11am BST, with a ВЈ50 shopping voucher prize draw on the call. Worth blocking an hour while the autumn booking window is open.
Full spotlight on the websiteвЂ¦ link in the comments рџ’¬

item.title: The client for this one is clear the moment you read itвЂ¦ HNW, sporting, multi-generational, or anyone circling a September or October Scottish escape. рџЏґу Ѓ§у Ѓўу Ѓіу ЃЈу Ѓґу Ѓї
item.description:
The client for this one is clear the moment you read itвЂ¦ HNW, sporting, multi-generational, or anyone circling a September or October Scottish escape. рџЏґу Ѓ§у Ѓўу Ѓіу ЃЈу Ѓґу Ѓї
Gleneagles has a senior ghillie who designed and hand-ties the estate's own salmon fly, the Gleneagles Glory, drawing its colours from the hotel's interior. Every guest on a fishing trip leaves with one. That kind of depth is not something a newer property can manufacture, and it is exactly what your client is paying for.
Three championship golf courses, a Michelin two-star restaurant (the only one in Scotland at publication), a gundog school, a riding schoolвЂ¦ the whole party can be busy on the same estate, on the same stay. вњЁ
The autumn calendar still has room. Full spotlight on the websiteвЂ¦ link in the comments рџ’¬

item.title: One for the expedition specialists in the group рџ§­
item.description:
One for the expedition specialists in the group рџ§­
Aurora Expeditions has turned 35 and they're marking it with a campaign built to move enquiries this week. The campaign runs to the end of September and pairs up to 30% off Antarctica 26/27 and Arctic 27 voyages with up to ВЈ2,600 air credit applied as an additional voyage discount. That long-haul flight cost to Ushuaia is usually the thing that makes a considering-it client hesitate. This takes it off the table.
The ships are the Greg Mortimer and Sylvia Earle. Small expedition vessels with X-Bow hulls рџЊЉ that cut through the Drake Passage rather than ride over it. Around 130 to 160 guests. Real Zodiac time, ice camping, citizen science tie-ins. This is not a mainstream brand with a polar add-on.
Pull your expedition enquiry list this week and match names to voyages before September closes.
Full spotlight on the websiteвЂ¦ link in the comments рџ’¬

item.title: One for the long-haul winter-sun specialistsвЂ¦ TUI has announced the only nonstop UK flights to Zanzibar, departing from Gatwick from 3 November 2027. Twice weekly, Wednesdays and Sundays, through to 22 March 2028. рџЊЉ
item.description: One for the long-haul winter-sun specialistsвЂ¦ TUI has announced the only nonstop UK flights to Zanzibar, departing from Gatwick from 3 November 2027. Twice weekly, Wednesdays and Sundays, through to 22 March 2028. рџЊЉ The connection has been the sticking point for years. That is now gone. Direct from Gatwick changes the conversation entirely, especially for clients who have been curious about the Spice Island but baulked at the journey. Lead-in prices start from ВЈ1,615 per person (two adults, all-inclusive, seven nights including flights and transfers). The Winter 2027 programme goes on sale 2 July 2026. Worth having your shortlist ready before that date. вњ€пёЏ Full spotlight on the websiteвЂ¦ link in the comments рџ’¬

item.title: One for the back pocket, this week's Hotel SpotlightвЂ¦ рџЏЁ
item.description: One for the back pocket, this week's Hotel SpotlightвЂ¦ рџЏЁ Bodrum Loft is the hotel for the client who wants Bodrum's glamour without the noise. Picture a little white village of minimalist villas stepping down a pine hillside to a private Aegean cove, barefoot beach-club mood, and a sea view from nearly every room. It is the calmer side of the peninsulaвЂ¦ thirtysomething couples, Istanbul families, a sleepy bay, and a genuinely good table with Paper Moon right over the water. Villa kitchens make it a strong one for longer stays and honeymoons too. вњ€пёЏ Full spotlight on the websiteвЂ¦ link in the comments рџ’¬

item.title: One for the luxury specialists in our communityвЂ¦ рџљў
item.description: One for the luxury specialists in our communityвЂ¦ рџљў Silversea has opened a savings window worth knowing about this week. Up to 45 per cent off select voyages across all seven continents, and it closes on 30 June. That hard date is the point. It gives you a clear, premium reason to pick up the phone to your established luxury clients this week rather than waiting for them to come to you. A few autumn 2026 sailings worth flagging: Greek Isles and Istanbul from ВЈ3,550 pp on Silver Ray, and two overlapping Greek Isles departures on Silver Nova and Silver Spirit from ВЈ3,750вЂ“ВЈ3,850 pp. Good comparison material if a client is weighing itinerary over ship. вњ€пёЏ Full spotlight on the websiteвЂ¦ link in the comments рџ’¬
